hero.title: Generate Stunning AI Wallpapers
hero.description:
Transform your ideas into beautiful wallpapers with AI.
Just type a prompt and download in seconds.

features.title: How to Generate AI Wallpapers
features.description: Create stunning wallpapers in four simple steps

items.title: Enter Your Prompt
items.description: Describe the wallpaper you want. Be as creative as you like - from cosmic landscapes to abstract art.

items.title: Choose a Style
items.description: Select from various AI models optimized for wallpaper generation - 4K, realistic, anime, and more.

items.title: Generate with AI
items.description: Our AI creates your wallpaper in seconds. Each generation uses advanced diffusion models.

items.title: Download & Enjoy
items.description: Download your wallpaper in high resolution. Perfect for desktop, mobile, or tablet screens.

showcase.title: AI Wallpaper Gallery
showcase.description: Explore wallpapers created by our community

items.question: What is AI Wallpaper Generator?
items.answer: AI Wallpaper Generator is a tool that uses artificial intelligence to create unique, high-quality wallpapers based on your text descriptions. Simply describe what you want, and our AI will generate it for you.

items.question: How many wallpapers can I generate?
items.answer: Each wallpaper generation costs 2 credits. You can get free credits when you sign up, and purchase additional credit packs anytime from our pricing page.

items.question: What resolution are the wallpapers?
items.answer: Our AI generates wallpapers in high resolution suitable for all screen sizes, including desktop monitors, laptops, tablets, and smartphones. You can download and use them on any device.

items.question: Can I use the wallpapers commercially?
items.answer: Yes! All wallpapers you generate are yours to use. Please review our Terms of Service for detailed usage rights and restrictions.

items.question: What AI models do you use?
items.answer: We use state-of-the-art image generation models to create your wallpapers. The specific models available may vary, and model names are displayed for transparency only.

cta.title: Start Generating AI Wallpapers Now
cta.description: Create stunning wallpapers in seconds with AI. Free credits available for new users.
